'''âb-w-sh''' ('''bawasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rumble|rumble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-w-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rumble|rumble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-w-sh
|-
! Lemma
| bawasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawashithi|bawashithi]] || [[word:bawashiji|bawashiji]] || [[word:bawashishi|bawashishi]] || [[word:bawashi|bawashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawashuthuth|bawashuthuth]] || [[word:bawashujuj|bawashujuj]] || [[word:bawashushush|bawashushush]] || [[word:bawash|bawash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawashuthu|bawashuthu]] || [[word:bawashuju|bawashuju]] || [[word:bawashushu|bawashushu]] || [[word:bawashu|bawashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawashufuth|bawashufuth]] || [[word:bawashufuj|bawashufuj]] || [[word:bawashufush|bawashufush]] || [[word:bawashuf|bawashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawashethe|bawashethe]] || [[word:bawasheje|bawasheje]] || [[word:bawasheshe|bawasheshe]] || [[word:bawashe|bawashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawashothoth|bawashothoth]] || [[word:bawashojoj|bawashojoj]] || [[word:bawashoshosh|bawashoshosh]] || [[word:bawash|bawash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawashotho|bawashotho]] || [[word:bawashojo|bawashojo]] || [[word:bawashosho|bawashosho]] || [[word:bawasho|bawasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawashofoth|bawashofoth]] || [[word:bawashofoj|bawashofoj]] || [[word:bawashofosh|bawashofosh]] || [[word:bawashof|bawashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:bawashĂŠthĂŠ|bawashĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:bawashĂŠjĂŠ|bawashĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:bawashĂŠshĂŠ|bawashĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:bawashĂŠ|bawashĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:bawashathath|bawashathath]] || [[word:bawashajaj|bawashajaj]] || [[word:bawashashash|bawashashash]] || [[word:bawash|bawash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:bawashatha|bawashatha]] || [[word:bawashaja|bawashaja]] || [[word:bawashasha|bawashasha]] || [[word:bawasha|bawasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:bawashafath|bawashafath]] || [[word:bawashafaj|bawashafaj]] || [[word:bawashafash|bawashafash]] || [[word:bawashaf|bawashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:bawashasha|bawashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gobawashasha|gobawashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokibawashasha|gokibawashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:bawashnĂŒsha|bawashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gobawashnknĂŒsha|gobawashnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokibawashnĂŒsha|gokibawashnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bawashĂ«sha|bawashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobawashnkshĂ«sha|gobawashnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibawashĂ«sha|gokibawashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawashrosha|bawashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawashnkrosha|gobawashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawashrosha|gokibawashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:bawashmusha|bawashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawashnkmusha|gobawashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawashmusha|gokibawashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:bawasherasha|bawasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gobawashnksherasha|gobawashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokibawasherasha|gokibawasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:bawashngasha|bawashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gobawashnkngasha|gobawashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokibawashngasha|gokibawashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:bawashyasha|bawashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gobawashnkyasha|gobawashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokibawashyasha|gokibawashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:bawashyamasha|bawashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gobawashnkyamasha|gobawashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokibawashyamasha|gokibawashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawashnĂŒshĂ«sha|bawashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawashnknĂŒshĂ«sha|gobawashnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawashnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokibawashnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawashnĂŒrosha|bawashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawashnknĂŒrosha|gobawashnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawashnĂŒrosha|gokibawashnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawashnĂŒmusha|bawashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawashnknĂŒmusha|gobawashnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawashnĂŒmusha|gokibawashnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawashĂ«nĂŒsha|bawashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gobawashnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawashĂ«nĂŒsha|gokibawashĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawashĂ«rosha|bawashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawashnkshĂ«rosha|gobawashnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawashĂ«rosha|gokibawashĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawashĂ«musha|bawashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawashnkshĂ«musha|gobawashnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawashĂ«musha|gokibawashĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawashronĂŒsha|bawashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawashnkronĂŒsha|gobawashnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawashronĂŒsha|gokibawashronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawashroshĂ«sha|bawashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawashnkroshĂ«sha|gobawashnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawashroshĂ«sha|gokibawashroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bawashromusha|bawashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobawashnkromusha|gobawashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibawashromusha|gokibawashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:bawashmunĂŒsha|bawashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gobawashnkmunĂŒsha|gobawashnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokibawashmunĂŒsha|gokibawashmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:bawashmushĂ«sha|bawashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gobawashnkmushĂ«sha|gobawashnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokibawashmushĂ«sha|gokibawashmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:bawashmurosha|bawashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gobawashnkmurosha|gobawashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokibawashmurosha|gokibawashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:bawash|bawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:bĂŠwĂŠsh|bĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hobawash|hobawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hobĂŠwĂŠsh|hobĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobawash|hohobawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohobĂŠwĂŠsh|hohobĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒbawash|nĂŒbawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒbĂŠwĂŠsh|nĂŒbĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbawash|nĂŒnĂŒbawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠwĂŠsh|nĂŒnĂŒbĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻbawash|nĂŻbawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻbĂŠwĂŠsh|nĂŻbĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbawash|nĂŻnĂŻbawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠwĂŠsh|nĂŻnĂŻbĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lubawash|lubawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lubĂŠwĂŠsh|lubĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubawash|lulubawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulubĂŠwĂŠsh|lulubĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:libawash|libawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:libĂŠwĂŠsh|libĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibawash|lilibawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilibĂŠwĂŠsh|lilibĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kobawash|kobawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kobĂŠwĂŠsh|kobĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobawash|kokobawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokobĂŠwĂŠsh|kokobĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kebawash|kebawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kebĂŠwĂŠsh|kebĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebawash|kekebawash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekebĂŠwĂŠsh|kekebĂŠwĂŠsh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
